expectations.text: Skill names Mermaid as the better tool for GitHub-native rendering
expectations.evidence: mentions GitHub renders Mermaid natively but not PlantUML

expectations.text: Skill explains the relevant difference (GitHub renders Mermaid in markdown; PlantUML needs an external renderer)
Skill either stops (offering to switch if user insists on PlantUML) OR offers both: a Mermaid snippet AND a PlantUML one, with the trade-off called out
expectations.evidence: offers to switch to Mermaid OR continue with PlantUML
